title: Star Wars Adventures in Colors and Shapes
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Adventures|more=Shape}} {{Audiobook |not_appearance=1 |image=[[File:StarWarsAdventuresinColorsandShapes-RPM.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Adventures in
Colors and Shapes'' |author= |narrator= |producer=[[Ted Kryczko]]''[[Star Wars Adventures in Colors and Shapes]]'' |director= |cover artist= |illustrator= |publisher=[[Buena Vista Records]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-in-the-uk-read-along-adventures|text=''Star Wars'' in the UK: Read-Along Adventures}} |release date=[[1984]] |rereleased= |media type=*[[Wikipedia:Phonograph record|33 1⁄3 RPM record]] (480) *[[Wikipedia:Cassette tape|Cassette tape]] (180DC) |run time=10 minutes |discs=1{{Amazon|url=Adventures-COLORS-SHAPES-Along-Record/dp/B002JH01LK|text=STAR WARS Adventures in COLORS and SHAPES #480 (24 pg Read Along Book and 33 1/3rpm Record)}} |cassettes=1 |pages=24 |isbn=none |timeline=After [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]The story occurs while [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] is with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] meaning it must take place after the events of ''[[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] which ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Atlas]]'' dates to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] |series=''[[Discovery Series]]'' |preceded by= |followed by=''[[Star Wars Adventures in ABC]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Adventures in Colors and Shapes''''' is a read-along book in [[Buena Vista Records]]' [[Discovery Series]]. The book was published in [[1984]], and released in both [[Wikipedia:Phonograph record|33 1⁄3 RPM]] record and [[Wikipedia:Cassette tape|cassette tape]] formats, including dialogue provided by [[Anthony Daniels]] as C-3PO, along with an uncredited voice cast and narrator. ==Plot summary== [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] try to help [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] repair the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] for a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] supply run by finding a replacement [[fulstar plate]], but Threepio keeps getting plates in the wrong color and shape. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars Adventures in Colors and Shapes}} ===Editions=== *(480); 1984; Buena Vista Records; Storybook & 33 1⁄3 RPM record; *(180DC); 1984; Buena Vista Records; Storybook & cassette tape; ===Cover gallery=== File:StarWarsAdventuresinColorsandShapes-RPM.jpg|Book-and-record File:StarWarsAdventuresinColorsandShapes-RPM-Back.jpg|Book-and-record back cover File:Adventures_in_Colors_and_Shapes.jpg|Book-and-tape ==Appearances== {{App |characters= *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] *[[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol droid]] **[[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droid]] |locations= *[[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] *[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] |vehicles= *[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] *[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] |technology= *[[Central Computer]] {{1st}} *[[Fulstar plate]] {{1st}} *[[Screwdriver/Legends|Screwdriver]] |miscellanea= *[[Color/Legends|Color]] }}
